label: TypeScript enum probe fixture
description: Version-independence probe: runs a TypeScript file that uses `export enum`. Native node strip-types (node 22/25 default) and node 20 both fail this; only a real transpiler (tsx/esbuild) on the loader path can pass.

requirement.text: Execute a fixture that uses a TypeScript enum to prove the harness runs full TypeScript, not native strip-types.
